decision: Implement local snapshot-load/resume (AC1). Add firecracker Manager.LoadSnapshot starting a fresh Firecracker process (no --config-file) then PUT /snapshot/load with mem_backend{backend_type:File},resume_vm:true (verified against Firecracker v1.15 swagger). Add LoadSnapshot to vmm.Manager. Branch handleVMResumeByPath on SnapshotID. AC2 (cross-node, #130/#250) deferred, not built on #130.
rationale: Resume ignored snapshot; snapshot was write-only. Repo targets FC CI v1.15 (scripts/download-fixtures.sh).
alternatives: mem_file_path (deprecated) rejected in favor of mem_backend; second PATCH /vm Resumed avoided via resume_vm:true.

decision: Adversarial review (gemini-2.5-pro, 3 rounds + premortem) complete. Fixed: (r1) mark-failed on state-restore double-failure, kill orphaned runtime if final persist fails, tap cleanup on attach failure; (r2) path-traversal guard on snapshot paths (mirrors handleDeleteSnapshot), 0750 vmDir perms. Deferred (need snapshot-record schema change, not AC1 happy path): architecture-match validation and config-drift detection. Premortem: resource-exhaustion + snapshot-corruption both handled gracefully (process killed, state reverted, actionable error).

Real KVM e2e NOT run: agent user not in kvm group, /dev/kvm inaccessible, no passwordless sudo (cannot elevate or bring up vagrant/libvirt), and host firecracker is v1.7.0 not the v1.15 target. Documented exact e2e procedure in .flowspec/features/issue-227-snapshot-load/e2e.md instead of faking. Unit-verified: request schema (100% sendSnapshotLoad, validated vs FC v1.15 swagger), waitForSocketReady, LoadSnapshot validation, full handler state machine + all error branches. Remaining for KVM: fresh-process spawn + real /snapshot/load resume.
